name: Potential System DLL Sideloading From Non System Locations
notes:
This rule detects DLL sideloading of DLLs usually located in system locations (System32, SysWOW64...)

Covered from SIGMA Rule.

Original Author: Nasreddine Bencherchali, Wietze Beukema (project and research), Chris Spehn (research WFH Dridex), XForceIR (SideLoadHunter Project)
SIGMA Title: System DLL Sideloading From Non System Locations
SIGMA Description: Detects DLL sideloading of DLLs usually located in system locations (System32, SysWOW64...)


Confidence: LOW

This rule may be covered under the Detection Rule License: https://ibm.biz/SigmaDetectionRuleLicense
conditions_text: when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
when the event QID is one of the following (5001844) Image loaded
when any of Filename (custom) are contained in any of Sideloaded DLLs - AlphaNumeric (Ignore Case)

when the event matches ((LOWER("File Directory") LIKE 'C:\Windows\System32\%' OR LOWER("File Directory") LIKE 'C:\Windows\SysWOW64\%' OR LOWER("File Directory") LIKE 'C:\Windows\WinSxS\%' OR LOWER("File Directory") LIKE 'C:\Windows\SoftwareDistribution\%' OR LOWER("File Directory") LIKE 'C:\Windows\SystemTemp\%') OR (LOWER("File Directory") = 'C:\Application Files\Common Files\microsoft shared\ClickToRun\%' AND LOWER("Process File File Path")='C:\Application Files\Common Files\microsoft shared\ClickToRun\OfficeClickToRun.exe') OR LOWER("File Directory") LIKE 'C:\Packages\Plugins\Microsoft.GuestConfiguration.ConfigurationforWindows\%' OR ((LOWER("Process File File Path") LIKE 'C:\Application Files\WindowsApps\DellInc.DellSupportAssistforPCs%' OR LOWER("Process File File Path") LIKE 'C:\Windows\System32\backgroundTaskHost.exe%') AND LOWER("File Directory") LIKE 'C:\Application Files\WindowsApps\DellInc.DellSupportAssistforPCs%') OR (LOWER("Process File File Path") ='C:\Windows\System32\%' AND LOWER("File Directory") LIKE '%\ssshim.dll') OR LOWER("Process File File Path") LIKE 'C:\$WINDOWS.~BT\%') AQL filter query
TD_list: APPLY Potential System DLL Sideloading From Non System Locations on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
AND when the event QID is one of the following (5001844) Image loaded
AND when any of Filename (custom) are contained in any of Sideloaded DLLs - AlphaNumeric (Ignore Case)

AND when the event matches ((LOWER("File Directory") LIKE 'C:\Windows\System32\%' OR LOWER("File Directory") LIKE 'C:\Windows\SysWOW64\%' OR LOWER("File Directory") LIKE 'C:\Windows\WinSxS\%' OR LOWER("File Directory") LIKE 'C:\Windows\SoftwareDistribution\%' OR LOWER("File Directory") LIKE 'C:\Windows\SystemTemp\%') OR (LOWER("File Directory") = 'C:\Application Files\Common Files\microsoft shared\ClickToRun\%' AND LOWER("Process File File Path")='C:\Application Files\Common Files\microsoft shared\ClickToRun\OfficeClickToRun.exe') OR LOWER("File Directory") LIKE 'C:\Packages\Plugins\Microsoft.GuestConfiguration.ConfigurationforWindows\%' OR ((LOWER("Process File File Path") LIKE 'C:\Application Files\WindowsApps\DellInc.DellSupportAssistforPCs%' OR LOWER("Process File File Path") LIKE 'C:\Windows\System32\backgroundTaskHost.exe%') AND LOWER("File Directory") LIKE 'C:\Application Files\WindowsApps\DellInc.DellSupportAssistforPCs%') OR (LOWER("Process File File Path") ='C:\Windows\System32\%' AND LOWER("File Directory") LIKE '%\ssshim.dll') OR LOWER("Process File File Path") LIKE 'C:\$WINDOWS.~BT\%') AQL filter query
RED_list: Event name: Potential System DLL Sideloading From Non System Locations
Event description: Detects DLL sideloading of DLLs usually located in system locations (System32, SysWOW64...)
Force the dispatched event to create a NEW offense, select the offense using Source IP
This information should contribute to the name of the associated offense(s)
